events.title: Women Day Celebration
events.description:
*WE Club of Vashi Navi Mumbai*
Activity- Image Building 
Date- 8/3/2026

Today on the Occasion of *Women’s Day* our Club members attended the Women’s Day Celebration – *Naari in a Saree* (नारी साड़ी में) 👩🥻, a 5 km Walkathon organised by Apollo Hospital.
The event beautifully celebrated the strength, grace, and spirit of women while promoting health and fitness.
Our enthusiastic participation made this an *Image Building Project of WE Club of Vashi*, reflecting our club’s commitment towards women empowerment and community engagement.
Proud to walk together for a healthy and empowered tomorrow.

projects.title: Anaaj Daan Relieve the Hunger
projects.description: Donating food is considered as the highest form of giving.

projects.title: Child Welfare
projects.description: Focuses on providing for children's physical needs, such as food, shelter, and healthcare. Ensuring children have access to opportunities for education, play, and positive social interactions, also includes transforming a girl child for the betterment of society.

projects.title: Senior Citizen
projects.description: We aim to improve their quality of life and ensure their well-being.

projects.title: Health
projects.description: Environment - Heal the Earth, Water Conservation, Solar Energy; Healthcare - Heal the Ailed; Cancer Care - Heal the Cancer patients.

projects.title: Women Welfare
projects.description: Aimed at improving the health, education, economic status, and promoting empowerment through vocational training and financial assistance, also includes maternal and infant health.

projects.title: Help the Needy
projects.description: Aims at providing financial aid, food, shelter, medical care, education, or other forms of support to help individuals or groups who are in a state of need or hardship, often due to poverty, lack of resources, or other difficulties.

projects.title: Image Building
projects.description: Crafting and maintaining a positive public perception of our association.

projects.title: Education
projects.description: It encompasses a broad range of assistance including adult education, awareness programs, skill development, vocational training and youth counseling.

projects.title: Animal Welfare
projects.description: It's about the quality of life an animal experiences and includes aspects like nutrition, housing, and freedom from pain, fear, and distress.

projects.title: Permanent Projects
projects.description: Building or repairing infrastructure such as water system, toilet blocks, classrooms and providing necessary soft goods like fans, lights, projector and others.

projects.title: Rural Development
projects.description: Aimed at improving the health, education, economic status, and promoting empowerment through vocational training and financial assistance.

projects.title: Enable the Specially Abled
projects.description: Involves taking actions that support and empower individuals with disabilities to participate fully in society.

data.description: WE Club of Uran paid the surgery cost of a financially needy woman at Gade Hospital,Uran
WE club of Uran paid the bill of caesarian delivery at Gade Hospital of a financially needy lady .

data.title: Donated wheat
data.description: feed the hunger

data.title: Donated grains
data.description: Feed the hunger
WE Club of Vasant Vihar donated 30 water bottles to underprivileged students of Jagruti Vidya Mandir.
WE Club of Thane Angels donated raincoats, biscuits & Chocolate to underprivileged children at the learning centre of Jeewanasha foundation.
WE Club of Vasant Vihar donated 30 umbrellas to underprivileged students of Jagruti Vidya Mandir
WE Club of Vile Parle sponsored baby clothes to new born babies at Marol Navin Municipal Maternity Hospital.
WE Club of Vasant Vihar sponsored 12 plastic chairs and 2 tables for the under privileged children who are given free education and guidance by Angel Express Foundation at their Chembur Branch
WE Club of Uran sponsored monthly medicine and health checkup for a specially abled child. This is a continuous project and will be done every month.
WE club of Uran celebrated Raksha Bhandan with dedicated officers and staff of the Uran Police Station
WE Club of Vashi Navi Mumbai donated 1000 note books to Agricultural College, Ware.
WE Club of Thane Angels  felicitated 5 10th std students - toppers of TMC school, Balkum by giving them notebooks, sweets & dresses.
WE CLUB of Thane Lake City donated 50 sets of text books, notebooks, geometry box and set of pen to Shree Arvind Gurukul School Badlapur.
WE club of New Panvel Steel Town sponsored 2 courses totally  free to 10 deserving college girls. 1) Tally accounting software 2) Advance GST DURATION : 5 Weeks.
WE Club of Vashi Navi Mumbai donated 800 Notebooks to New English School, Khalapur
WE Club of Vile Parle sponsored school fees of student studying at Umedbai Patel English School, Sunder Nagar, Malad (West)
WE Club of Chembur paid the School Fees of VII Std. student for 2025 - 26 for Rohan Gaikwad at St. Sebastian High School.
WE Club of Vasant Vihar Education donated 50 dozen notebooks at Jagruti Vidya Mandir
WE Club of Thane Lake City donated  fees of 8th std student of Gunjana High School.
WE Club of Vashi Navi Mumbai donated 1,752 notebooks & 22 sets of 8th std textbooks and 100 raincoats, Primary textbooks, tiffin boxes & crayons to 100 primary students at Dahiwali School, Karjat.
